title: polygala judithea
intro: Polygala judithea, also known as "King's crown" or "Greek valerian", is a perennial plant species in the family Polygalaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala judithea include its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other sleep disorders, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's root is typically dried and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
